title: No Fill / Water Supply Error
shortDescription: The washer is not receiving water or is filling too slowly.
fullDescription: The nF error code indicates the washer did not detect water entering the tub within the expected time. The water supply may be turned off, the inlet hoses may be kinked, or the water inlet valves may be faulty. Speed Queen washers require adequate water pressure (20-100 PSI) for proper filling.
symptoms: Washer does not fill with water

fixSteps.title: Check water supply
fixSteps.instruction: Verify both hot and cold water faucets behind the washer are fully turned on. Turn them off and back on to ensure full flow.

fixSteps.title: Inspect inlet hoses
fixSteps.instruction: Check both supply hoses for kinks, bends, or damage. Ensure hoses are not crushed behind the washer.

fixSteps.title: Clean inlet screens
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water supply. Disconnect hoses from the back of the washer. Remove and clean the small mesh screens in the inlet valve ports.

fixSteps.title: Test the inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Use a multimeter to test each inlet valve solenoid coil for continuity. Replace the valve if a coil reads open.

whenToCallPro: If the inlet valve needs replacement or the water pressure from the home supply is insufficient.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer nF no fill error fix

faq.q: What does nF mean on my Speed Queen washer?
faq.a: nF stands for No Fill. The washer is not receiving water within the expected time.

faq.q: What water pressure does Speed Queen require?
faq.a: Speed Queen washers require water pressure between 20 and 100 PSI for proper operation.

faq.q: Can I use the washer if only one supply line works?
faq.a: The washer needs both hot and cold water connections to operate properly, even if you only select cold wash cycles.

title: No Drain / Drain Failure
shortDescription: The washer cannot drain water within the allowed time.
fullDescription: The nd error code indicates the washer was unable to drain the water from the tub within the expected time. This is commonly caused by a clogged drain hose, blocked drain pump filter, or a faulty drain pump. Speed Queen washers have a drain timeout of approximately 4-8 minutes depending on the model.
symptoms: Water remaining in the tub after cycle

fixSteps.title: Check the drain hose
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the drain hose for kinks or blockages. Disconnect from the standpipe and check for obstructions. Ensure the hose is installed at the proper height (no higher than 96 inches).

fixSteps.title: Clean the drain pump filter
fixSteps.instruction: Locate the drain pump filter access (varies by model). Place towels and a container below. Open the filter and remove any coins, lint, or debris.

fixSteps.title: Inspect the pump impeller
fixSteps.instruction: With the filter removed, check that the pump impeller rotates freely. Remove any items blocking it.

fixSteps.title: Replace the drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: If the pump motor is not running, disconnect power, access the pump from the bottom or rear of the washer, disconnect hoses and wiring, and install a new pump.

whenToCallPro: If the drain pump needs replacement or if the blockage is in the internal plumbing of the washer.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer nd no drain error fix

faq.q: How do I manually drain my Speed Queen washer?
faq.a: Most Speed Queen washers have a drain pump filter that can be opened to manually drain water. Place a container below before opening.

faq.q: Can excess detergent cause nd?
faq.a: Excessive suds can slow drainage and trigger the nd error. Use the correct amount of HE detergent.

faq.q: What is the maximum drain hose height?
faq.a: The drain hose should be no higher than 96 inches from the floor for proper drainage.

title: Door Lock Error
shortDescription: The washer door or lid could not be locked.
fullDescription: The dL error code indicates the washer's door or lid lock mechanism failed to engage. The washer requires the door to be securely locked before any cycle can begin. This can be caused by a misaligned door, a faulty lock mechanism, or an obstruction preventing proper closure.

causes.cause: Door or lid not fully closed
Obstruction in the door latch area

symptoms: Washer will not start a cycle
Lid or door does not close securely

fixSteps.title: Close the door firmly
fixSteps.instruction: Open the door or lid fully and close it again firmly until you hear or feel the latch engage.

fixSteps.title: Clear obstructions
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the door or lid latch area for any lint, clothing, or debris preventing the lock from engaging. Clean the latch area.

fixSteps.title: Check door alignment
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the door hinges and striker plate for proper alignment. Tighten any loose hinge screws. Adjust the striker if the door does not close flush.

fixSteps.title: Replace the door lock
fixSteps.instruction: If the lock mechanism is faulty, disconnect power, remove the top panel or front panel, disconnect the lock wiring, and install a new lock assembly.

whenToCallPro: If the lock mechanism or wiring needs replacement beyond simple cleaning and alignment.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer dL door lock error fix

faq.q: What does dL mean on Speed Queen?
faq.a: dL means Door Lock failure. The washer could not engage the door or lid lock to start the cycle.

faq.q: Is dL the same as E:dL?
faq.a: Yes, some models display dL while newer electronic models display E:dL. Both indicate the same door lock issue.

faq.q: Can I override the door lock?
faq.a: No, the door lock is a safety feature that cannot and should not be overridden.

title: Door Open
shortDescription: The washer has detected that the door or lid is open.
fullDescription: The do error code indicates the washer's door or lid switch is reporting that the door is open. The washer requires the door to be closed and locked before operation. This can be caused by the door not being fully latched, a faulty door switch, or a wiring issue.

causes.cause: Door or lid not fully closed

symptoms: Washer stops if door is bumped
Door appears closed but error persists

fixSteps.title: Close the door securely
fixSteps.instruction: Open the door or lid completely and close it firmly, ensuring the latch clicks into place.

fixSteps.title: Inspect the latch mechanism
fixSteps.instruction: Check the door latch and striker for damage or misalignment. Clean any debris from the latch area.

fixSteps.title: Test the door switch
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect power. Use a multimeter to test the door switch for continuity when the door is closed. The switch should have continuity when the door is latched.

fixSteps.title: Replace the door switch
fixSteps.instruction: If the switch does not show continuity when the door is closed, replace it. Remove the switch from its mounting, disconnect the wires, and install the new switch.

whenToCallPro: If the switch and latch appear fine but the error persists, the control board input may be faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer do door open error fix

faq.q: What does do mean on Speed Queen?
faq.a: do stands for Door Open. The washer thinks the door or lid is not properly closed.

faq.q: Can a weak door spring cause this error?
faq.a: Yes, if the door does not close firmly enough to engage the switch, a weak spring or worn hinge can be the cause.

faq.q: Is the door switch easy to replace?
faq.a: Yes, the door switch is typically held by one or two screws and has a simple plug connector. It is one of the easier repairs.

title: Door Unlock Failure
shortDescription: The washer door or lid failed to unlock after a cycle.
fullDescription: The dU error code indicates the door or lid lock mechanism did not unlock after the cycle completed. The lock solenoid may have failed, or there may be a wiring issue preventing the unlock signal from reaching the lock mechanism.

causes.cause: Temporary electrical glitch in lock solenoid

symptoms: Door or lid will not open after cycle

fixSteps.title: Wait for timeout
fixSteps.instruction: Wait 3-5 minutes after the cycle ends. The lock may take additional time to release. Try opening the door gently.

fixSteps.title: Power cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the washer for 2 minutes, then plug it back in. The lock should release when power is removed.

fixSteps.title: Use manual release
fixSteps.instruction: If the door remains locked, locate the manual release mechanism. On front-load models, access it through the drain pump filter area. On top-load models, reach under the lid to find the release tab.

fixSteps.title: Replace door lock assembly
fixSteps.instruction: If the lock repeatedly fails to release, replace the entire door lock assembly. Disconnect power, access the lock, remove wiring and mounting hardware, and install new lock.

whenToCallPro: If the manual release does not work or the lock repeatedly fails to release after replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer dU door unlock error fix

faq.q: How do I get my clothes out when the door is locked?
faq.a: First try unplugging the washer for 2 minutes. If that does not work, use the manual door release mechanism.

faq.q: Will unplugging the washer release the door lock?
faq.a: Usually yes, most Speed Queen door locks release when power is removed. Wait 2 minutes after unplugging.

faq.q: Is it safe to force open the door?
faq.a: No, forcing the door can damage the lock mechanism and the door. Use the manual release or call a technician.

title: Locked Rotor / Motor Stall
shortDescription: The washer motor is stalled and cannot rotate.
fullDescription: The Lr error code indicates the washer motor has stalled or cannot rotate the drum. The motor control has detected that the motor is drawing excessive current without producing rotation. This is commonly caused by a jammed drum, overloaded washer, or a failed motor.

causes.cause: Foreign object jammed between basket and tub

symptoms: Motor hums but drum does not rotate
Washer stops at beginning of cycle

fixSteps.title: Reduce the load
fixSteps.instruction: Remove some items from the drum. Speed Queen washers have specific load capacities that should not be exceeded.

fixSteps.title: Check for obstructions
fixSteps.instruction: With the washer unplugged, manually rotate the drum to check if it moves freely. Listen for scraping sounds that indicate a foreign object.

fixSteps.title: Inspect for jammed items
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the agitator (top-load) or check around the door boot (front-load) for items caught between the inner basket and outer tub.

fixSteps.title: Test the motor
fixSteps.instruction: If the drum rotates freely by hand but the motor does not run, test the motor windings with a multimeter. Replace the motor if windings are open or shorted.

whenToCallPro: If the motor or bearings need replacement, as these are complex repairs requiring specialized tools.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer Lr locked rotor motor error fix

faq.q: What does Lr mean on Speed Queen?
faq.a: Lr stands for Locked Rotor, meaning the motor is stalled and cannot rotate the drum.

faq.q: Can overloading cause Lr?
faq.a: Yes, an overloaded drum is the most common cause. Reduce the load size and try again.

faq.q: Should I smell burning during Lr?
faq.a: A brief burning smell is possible if the motor is stalling under load. If the smell persists, unplug the washer and call a technician.

title: Detergent Dispenser Error
shortDescription: The automatic detergent dispenser has malfunctioned.
fullDescription: The Ed error code indicates the automatic detergent dispenser system has encountered a problem. The dispenser motor or actuator may have failed, or the dispenser tray may be jammed. This code only appears on models equipped with an automatic dispenser system.

fixSteps.title: Clean the dispenser
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the detergent dispenser tray and clean it thoroughly with warm water. Remove any caked-on or dried detergent.

fixSteps.title: Check for obstructions
fixSteps.instruction: With the tray removed, inspect the dispenser housing for any debris or dried detergent blocking the mechanism.

fixSteps.title: Test the dispenser mechanism
fixSteps.instruction: Reinstall the tray and run a cycle. Listen for the dispenser motor activating. If no sound or clicking is heard, the motor may be faulty.

fixSteps.title: Replace dispenser motor
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect power. Access the dispenser motor behind the front panel. Disconnect the wiring and mounting screws. Install the new motor.

whenToCallPro: If cleaning the dispenser does not resolve the issue and the motor needs replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer Ed dispenser error fix

faq.q: Can I still use the washer with Ed error?
faq.a: You may be able to add detergent directly to the drum and run cycles, but the automatic dispenser will not function until fixed.

faq.q: What causes detergent to cake in the dispenser?
faq.a: Using too much detergent, using powdered detergent, or humidity can cause caking. Clean the dispenser monthly.

faq.q: Do all Speed Queen washers have automatic dispensers?
faq.a: No, only certain models have automatic dispensers. Basic models require manual detergent addition.

title: Long Drain Error
shortDescription: The washer drain cycle is exceeding the maximum time allowed.
fullDescription: The E:Ld error code indicates the washer has been trying to drain water for longer than the maximum allowed time. The water level has not dropped sufficiently despite the drain pump running. This is typically caused by a blockage in the drain system or a failing drain pump.

fixSteps.title: Check drain hose height
fixSteps.instruction: The drain hose should not be installed higher than 96 inches. Check that the hose has a proper high loop and drains into the standpipe correctly.

fixSteps.title: Clear the drain hose
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect the drain hose from the standpipe and check for blockages. Run water through the hose to test flow.

fixSteps.title: Clean drain pump filter
fixSteps.instruction: Access the drain pump filter (location varies by model). Remove debris, coins, or lint from the filter and pump housing.

fixSteps.title: Replace drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: If the pump does not run or has weak flow after clearing, replace the drain pump assembly.

whenToCallPro: If the pump needs replacement or if the blockage cannot be located in the accessible drain components.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:Ld long drain error fix

faq.q: What is the difference between nd and E:Ld?
faq.a: nd is a no-drain condition detected immediately. E:Ld indicates the drain is working but too slowly, taking longer than the maximum allowed time.

faq.q: Can fabric softener buildup cause E:Ld?
faq.a: Yes, fabric softener residue can accumulate in the drain hose and pump, restricting flow over time.

faq.q: How do I access the drain pump filter?
faq.a: The location varies by model. On front-load models, it is typically behind a small access door at the lower front. Consult your model's documentation.

title: Flood Condition Detected
shortDescription: The washer has detected water in the base pan, indicating a leak.
fullDescription: The E:FL error code indicates the washer's flood sensor has detected water in the base pan underneath the washer. This means there is an internal water leak. The washer will stop operation and engage the drain pump to remove water. This error should be addressed immediately to prevent water damage.

fixSteps.title: Stop the washer and water
fixSteps.instruction: Cancel the cycle and turn off both water supply faucets immediately. Unplug the washer.

fixSteps.title: Inspect for visible leaks
fixSteps.instruction: Pull the washer away from the wall and look for any visible water leaks from hose connections, the door boot seal, or the tub.

fixSteps.title: Check internal hose connections
fixSteps.instruction: With the washer unplugged, remove the rear or bottom panel to access internal hoses. Check all hose clamps and connections for leaks or looseness.

fixSteps.title: Dry the base pan and sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Soak up any water in the base pan with towels. Dry the flood sensor. If no active leak is found, the sensor may have triggered from a previous small leak.

whenToCallPro: If the leak source cannot be identified or if the tub or a major component needs replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:FL flood error fix

faq.q: Is E:FL a serious error?
faq.a: Yes, E:FL indicates an internal leak that can cause water damage. Turn off water and power immediately.

faq.q: Can a flood sensor malfunction?
faq.a: Yes, the sensor can trigger from condensation or a previously dried leak. Dry the base pan and test again.

faq.q: Does my Speed Queen have a flood sensor?
faq.a: Most front-load and some higher-end top-load Speed Queen models include a flood sensor. Check your model's specifications.

title: Motor Frequency Error
shortDescription: The motor is not running at the correct frequency or speed.
fullDescription: The E:Fr error code indicates the motor controller has detected that the motor is not running at the expected frequency. The motor speed is outside the acceptable range for the current cycle phase. This can be caused by an overloaded machine, motor issues, or a faulty inverter board.

fixSteps.title: Reduce the load
fixSteps.instruction: Remove some items to reduce the weight in the drum. Restart the cycle.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the washer for 5 minutes, then plug it back in and run a cycle to see if the error clears.

fixSteps.title: Check belt tension (if applicable)
fixSteps.instruction: If your model uses a drive belt, check the belt for wear, cracking, or slipping. Replace if worn.

fixSteps.title: Inspect motor and inverter
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, the motor inverter board or motor itself may be faulty. Visual inspection can reveal burn marks or damage, but testing requires professional equipment.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after reducing the load and power resetting, professional diagnosis of the motor and inverter is recommended.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:Fr motor frequency error fix

faq.q: What causes motor frequency errors?
faq.a: Overloading is the most common cause. Motor or inverter board failures are less common but can also trigger this code.

faq.q: Is E:Fr dangerous?
faq.a: The motor protection circuits prevent damage, but you should not continue to run the washer until the cause is resolved.

faq.q: Can a power surge cause E:Fr?
faq.a: Yes, power surges can affect the motor inverter board. A power reset may clear a temporary issue.

title: Long Fill Error
shortDescription: The washer is taking too long to fill with water.
fullDescription: The E:LF error code indicates the washer has been trying to fill with water for longer than the maximum allowed time but has not reached the target water level. The water supply is partially restricted or flowing too slowly. Unlike the nF code (no fill at all), E:LF means water is entering but not fast enough.
symptoms: E:LF appears after extended fill time
Cycle eventually starts but takes too long

fixSteps.title: Open water valves fully
fixSteps.instruction: Check both hot and cold water faucets behind the washer. Turn them fully counterclockwise to ensure maximum flow.

fixSteps.title: Check water pressure
fixSteps.instruction: Test your home water pressure with a pressure gauge at a nearby faucet. Speed Queen requires 20-100 PSI. If below 20, contact your water utility.

fixSteps.title: Clean inlet screens
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water supply, disconnect hoses, and clean the inlet screen filters on the washer and the hose ends.

fixSteps.title: Replace inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: If screens are clean and water pressure is adequate, the inlet valve may not be opening fully. Test with a multimeter and replace if faulty.

whenToCallPro: If the home water pressure is too low or the inlet valve needs professional replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:LF long fill error fix

faq.q: What is the difference between nF and E:LF?
faq.a: nF means no water is entering at all. E:LF means water is entering but too slowly to meet the fill time limit.

faq.q: Can multiple appliances running reduce water pressure?
faq.a: Yes, running multiple water-using appliances simultaneously can reduce pressure. Try running the washer when other appliances are off.

faq.q: Should I replace both hot and cold inlet valves?
faq.a: Test each valve individually with a multimeter. Replace only the faulty valve unless both are aging.

title: Suds Lock / Excessive Suds
shortDescription: The washer has detected excessive suds that are preventing proper operation.
fullDescription: The E:SL error code means the washer has detected an excessive amount of suds that are interfering with the wash cycle and potentially causing a suds lock condition. The washer will attempt extended rinse cycles to clear the suds. This is most commonly caused by using too much detergent or using non-HE detergent.
symptoms: Cycle runs much longer than normal

fixSteps.title: Let the washer clear suds
fixSteps.instruction: Allow the washer to complete its extended rinse cycles to clear the excess suds. This may take an additional 20-30 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Run extra rinse
fixSteps.instruction: After the cycle completes, run an additional Rinse and Spin cycle without any detergent to remove residual suds.

fixSteps.title: Adjust detergent amount
fixSteps.instruction: For future loads, use only HE detergent and reduce the amount. Speed Queen recommends following the detergent manufacturer's HE dosage guidelines.

fixSteps.title: Run a clean cycle
fixSteps.instruction: Run a hot water wash cycle with no clothes and no detergent, or use a machine cleaner tablet, to remove detergent buildup from the washer.

whenToCallPro: Only if the suds error continues after switching to proper HE detergent and reducing the amount, which may indicate a drainage issue.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:SL suds lock error fix

faq.q: What is a suds lock?
faq.a: A suds lock occurs when too many suds prevent the pump from draining properly, trapping air in the pump and reducing its efficiency.

faq.q: How much detergent should I use?
faq.a: Follow the detergent manufacturer's HE dosage guidelines, which is typically 1-2 tablespoons for a normal load.

faq.q: Does soft water affect detergent usage?
faq.a: Yes, soft water requires less detergent. If you have a water softener, reduce your detergent amount by about one-third.

title: No Fill (Electronic Control)
shortDescription: The electronic control has detected no water entering the washer.
fullDescription: The E:nF error code on newer electronic Speed Queen models indicates no water was detected entering the washer. This is the electronic control version of the nF error. The washer expected water to begin filling but detected no change in water level. Check the water supply, hoses, and inlet valves.
symptoms: Cycle does not progress past fill

fixSteps.title: Verify water supply
fixSteps.instruction: Check that both hot and cold water supply valves behind the washer are fully open.

fixSteps.title: Check for frozen lines
fixSteps.instruction: In cold weather, check if the supply hoses or pipes have frozen. Allow them to thaw naturally or use a hair dryer on low setting (never use an open flame).

fixSteps.title: Clean inlet screens
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water, disconnect hoses, clean the mesh screens at both the hose ends and the washer inlet ports.

fixSteps.title: Test inlet valve solenoids
fixSteps.instruction: With the washer unplugged, disconnect the wires from the inlet valve and use a multimeter to test each solenoid coil. Replace the valve if any coil is open.

whenToCallPro: If inlet valve replacement is needed or if the home plumbing supply is the issue.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:nF no fill error fix

faq.q: Is E:nF different from nF?
faq.a: They indicate the same problem. E:nF appears on newer electronic control models while nF appears on older models.

faq.q: Can a water softener cause no fill?
faq.a: A water softener regeneration cycle can temporarily reduce water pressure. If the washer fills during other times, the softener may be the cause.

faq.q: Should I check the water pressure?
faq.a: Yes, the washer needs 20-100 PSI. A water pressure gauge at the laundry faucet can quickly confirm.

title: Door Open (Electronic Control)
shortDescription: The electronic control has detected the door is open.
fullDescription: The E:do error code on electronic Speed Queen models indicates the door or lid switch is reporting an open state. This is the electronic version of the do error. The washer will not start or will pause mid-cycle if the door is detected as open.

causes.cause: Door or lid not fully closed

symptoms: Door appears closed but error persists

fixSteps.title: Close door firmly
fixSteps.instruction: Open the door completely and close it firmly until the latch clicks.

fixSteps.title: Check door alignment
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the door hinges and striker plate for proper alignment. Adjust or tighten as needed.

fixSteps.title: Test door switch
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect power and test the door switch with a multimeter. It should have continuity when the door is closed.

fixSteps.title: Replace door switch
fixSteps.instruction: If the switch fails the continuity test, replace it. Remove the old switch and install a new one.

whenToCallPro: If the door switch and alignment are fine but the error persists, the control board input may be faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:do door open error fix

faq.q: Is E:do different from do?
faq.a: They indicate the same issue. E:do appears on newer electronic control models.

faq.q: Can vibration cause E:do?
faq.a: Heavy vibration during spin can sometimes jar the door switch. If this happens repeatedly, check the switch and the washer leveling.

faq.q: Where is the door switch located?
faq.a: The door switch is typically located near the door frame, behind the front panel or under the top panel depending on the model.

title: Door Lock Failure (Electronic Control)
shortDescription: The electronic control detected that the door lock did not engage.
fullDescription: The E:dL error on newer electronic Speed Queen models indicates the door lock mechanism failed to engage. The control board sent the lock command but did not receive confirmation that the lock is in the locked position. This is the electronic version of the dL code.

causes.cause: Door not fully closed before lock attempt
Wiring issue to the door lock

symptoms: Lock clicking sound but not engaging
Door lock indicator does not illuminate

fixSteps.title: Close door and retry
fixSteps.instruction: Open the door fully, close it firmly until the latch clicks, then press Start.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the washer for 2 minutes, plug it back in, and try starting a cycle.

fixSteps.title: Inspect the lock mechanism
fixSteps.instruction: With the washer unplugged, check the door lock for visible damage or wear. Check the wiring connections to the lock assembly.

fixSteps.title: Replace door lock assembly
fixSteps.instruction: If the lock mechanism is faulty, disconnect power, remove the access panel, disconnect wiring and mounting hardware, and install a new lock assembly.

whenToCallPro: If the lock assembly has been replaced but the error continues, the control board may need professional diagnosis.
videoSearchQuery: Speed Queen washer E:dL door lock error fix

faq.q: Is E:dL the same as dL?
faq.a: Yes, they indicate the same issue. E:dL is displayed on newer electronic control models.

faq.q: Can I bypass the door lock?
faq.a: No, the door lock is a critical safety feature. Bypassing it could result in injury from a spinning drum.

faq.q: How long do Speed Queen door locks last?
faq.a: Speed Queen door locks typically last 5-10 years under normal use. Commercial units may need more frequent replacement.
